title: DHCBA to abstain from work on May 25 against proposal to raise pecuniary jurisdiction of district courts
description: The Delhi High Court Bar Association (DHCBA) has decided to abstain from work on Monday (May 25) over the proposal to increase the pecuniary jurisdiction of the district courts from ₹2 crores to ₹20 crores. The Coordination Committee of the All District Courts Bar Association of Delhi had in May 2025 had written to the Law Minister Arjun Ram Meghwal and members of Law Commission requesting the enhancement of pecuniary jurisdiction of district courts from ₹2 crores to ₹20 crores. A comm
